feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: JSON Payload Download Implementation in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently working on a custom RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming Model) Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. In this application, we use an API to send data to an external portal.

Now there is a new requirement when the user clicks a button, the JSON payload that is used in the ABAP program for sending data via the API should be downloaded in JSON format.

For this purpose, I have already created a custom action in the Behavior Definition, and the button is visible in the Application. My question is how to implement the download functionality so that the same JSON payload used for the API call can be downloaded by the user in JSON format and Also, please explain how to implement the JSON download functionality in the RAP application with step by step guidance.

Thank you,

entry.title: Infinite loading in rap object page
entry.content:
Hello, I made a program for rap odata v4. I can see my list page but when I get into create buttorn or object page, I can't see any elements of object page still stuck in loading page. 

 

 

Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
Log-dbg.js:452 2026-01-20 19:44:29.660500 Modules that use an anonymous define() call must be loaded with a require() call; they must not be executed via script tag or nested into other modules. All other usages will fail in future releases or when standard AMD loaders are used or when ui5loader runs in async mode. Now using substitute name ~anonymous~1.js - sap.ui.ModuleSystem
g @ Log-dbg.js:452
Util-dbg.js:83 Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'getMetadata')
at Object.calcTypeWidth (Util-dbg.js:83:22)
at Util-dbg.js:251:26
at Array.reduce (<anonymous>)
at i.calcColumnWidth (Util-dbg.js:238:46)
at l._calcColumnWidth (PropertyHelper-dbg.js:396:20)
at l.calculateColumnWidth (PropertyHelper-dbg.js:356:15)
at p._calculateColumnWidth (Column-dbg.js:424:73)
Log-dbg.js:452 2026-01-20 19:44:33.220000 TypeError: r.storeInnerAppStateAsync is not a function -
g @ Log-dbg.js:452
Log-dbg.js:452 2026-01-20 19:44:35.351500 this.contextPath.getObject is not a function - TypeError: this.contextPath.getObject is not a function
TypeError: this.contextPath.getObject is not a function
at i.e [as render] (DraftHandlerButton-dbg.js:135:72)
at Promise.resolve.u.runWithPreprocessors.id (BuildingBlock-dbg.js:361:14)
at y.runWithPreprocessors (ManagedObject-dbg.js:1047:14)
at constructor.init (BuildingBlock-dbg.js:356:46)
at c._initCompositeSupport (Fragment-dbg.js:190:47)
at ManagedObject-dbg.js:514:12
at constructor (ManagedObject-dbg.js:501:4)
at new constructor (Fragment-dbg.js:122:18)
at Fragment-dbg.js:392:15
at y.runWithOwner (ManagedObject-dbg.js:1074:14)
g @ Log-dbg.js:452
Log-dbg.js:452 2026-01-20 19:44:35.370100 g.oView.setModel is not a function - TypeError: g.oView.setModel is not a function
TypeError: g.oView.setModel is not a function
at TemplatedViewServiceFactory-dbg.js:377:32                 these errors appear in console

entry.title: RAP Fiori Elements List Report Page with Analytical Table - How to?
entry.content:
Hi community,

I’m currently trying to implement a Fiori Elements List Report based on RAP and OData V4 and I’m struggling to align the current technical limitations with what is announced on the SAP roadmap.

My requirement

I need a generated Fiori Elements application that provides:

  • a List Report
    • using an Analytical Table
    • showing totals and subtotals for measures (amounts / quantities with currency or unit)
    • while still allowing create / update operations on the underlying business data via RAP

In other words:
👉Aggregations (totals/subtotals) and editability in the same List Page.

Roadmap reference

According to the SAP Roadmap (Q3 2025):

Support for analytical tables
Use analytical tables to provide users with totals and subtotals in applications
Feature is delivered as described in the documentation: Tables – SAPUI5 SDK

Based on this roadmap entry, I would assume that using an AnalyticalTable in a Fiori Elements List Report is now intended to be a supported and productive option.

What I experience in practice

  • When using a transactional RAP BO (provider contract transactional_query) as the data source:
    • editing works as expected
    • but configuring the table as AnalyticalTable leads to aggregation-related errors
      (e.g. “Aggregation not supported for this entity type” or
      “Property ‘Currency’ is not flagged as custom aggregate”)
    • When switching to an analytical query view (@analytics.query: true😞
      • totals and subtotals work
      • but the entity becomes read-only, so editing is no longer possible
    • The Annotations @odata.applySupportedForAggregation: #FULL
      (mentioned in this scenario) is not permitted in RAP CDS view entities.

My open questions

  1. With the roadmap item marked as delivered:
    1. is it now officially supported to use an Analytical Table in a Fiori Elements List Report on top of a transactional RAP BO?
  2. If yes: what is the recommended architecture?
    1. a single transactional RAP BO with analytical capabilities?

    2. or still a separation between analytical (read-only) and transactional entities?

  3. If not: does the roadmap item only refer to UI5 analytical tables in general, but not to RAP-based, editable Fiori Elements List Reports yet?

Any clarification on the intended usage and current limitations would be highly appreciated.

Thanks a lot in advance and best regards;
Sarah

entry.title: CDS Custom entity - clicking on line item always shows the Header entity name
entry.content:
Hi,

I am developing a custom entity based RAP development which displays Job details in a header report. by clicking on the header row, it takes to the line item report. 

But the report always points to the Parent entity name when clicking on the line item report.

Request your support to identify the issue. Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Shankar Sanke.

entry.title: RAP EML to update Equipment Classification Characteristic value does not work
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a SAP S4 HANA Public Cloud environment. In a ABAP Class method, I have following RAP EML code to update the characteristic value of a Technical object Equipment.

DATA: lt_update TYPE TABLE FOR UPDATE i_equipmentclfncharvaluetp.
SELECT SINGLE
    equipment,
    classtype,
    classinternalid,
    charcinternalid,
    clfncharcvaluepositionnumber
  FROM i_equipmentclfncharvaluetp
  WHERE equipment      = '000000000010000228'
    AND characteristic = 'PRODUCT_STATUS_NAME'
  INTO @DATA(ls_db).

lt_update = VALUE #(
  ( %tky-%key-equipment                      = ls_db-equipment
    %tky-%key-classtype                      = ls_db-classtype
    %tky-%key-classinternalid                = ls_db-classinternalid
    %tky-%key-charcinternalid                = ls_db-charcinternalid
    %tky-%key-clfncharcvaluepositionnumber   = ls_db-clfncharcvaluepositionnumber
    charcvalue = '02' 
    %control-charcvalue = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
  )
).

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_equipmenttp
  ENTITY equipmentclassfctncharcsvalue
  UPDATE FROM lt_update
  FAILED   DATA(lt_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(lt_reported).

COMMIT ENTITIES
  RESPONSE OF i_equipmenttp
  FAILED   DATA(lt_commit_failed)
  REPORTED DATA(lt_commit_reported).

The Equipment and Characteristic name as well as the value to be updated (CharcValue = '2' ) are all correct but still the code does not work. In the lt_commit_reported internal table, It keeps giving me error "No value was assigned to "Product Status"".

If I call an Equipment API with same details via POSTMAN , the update works as expected and no issues there.

Can someone help here and see what am i missing please?

Br

sapdevnl

entry.title: SAP Change document integration on RAP - I_ChangeDocument_2 is not released
entry.content:
Sometimes I dont understant SAP

im trying to achieve change document integrations on my custom RAP development.  ABAP Cloud on BTP

im following SAP documentation

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/integrating-change-documents

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/displaying-change-documents-on-ui

but im facing error -> The use of CDS Entity I_ChangeDocument_2 is not permitted.

and i found the note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003337092 that says "The views I_ChangeDocument_2, I_ChangeDocument, I_ChangeDocumentItem are technical views which only used internally and it is not planned to release them"

so , what should i do to achieve the change documents integration?

@Madhumathi_ any idea? im also following your blog

entry.title: Disable custom action button when a field value changed in SAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
I have a custom action implemented in manifest.json

 "_Attachment/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem": {
   "actions": {
     "idUploadAtt": {
       "press": ".extension.xxx.ext.controller.ObjectPage.onAttachmentUpload",
       "visible": true,
       "enabled": ".extension.xxx.ext.controller.ObjectPage.onAttachmentUploadEnable",
       "requiresSelection": false,
       "text": "Add a Link"
     }
   }
 }

i have the handler implemented in the controller extension. 

I need the custom action button dynamically enable/disable based from one of the field values in the object page. If value is blank, custom action button is disabled and vice versa.

However, I checked that the handler in the controller extension is only triggered during routing to the object page or changing to edit mode. It does not trigger when the field value is changed.

Can you advise how can I trigger the handler during field value change?

entry.title: Visualisation Draft record Odata V2 versus Odata V4
entry.content:
hey,

we've written an application in RAP Odata V2 with draft. On the overview page,  under the draft record, stood the word "Concept".

We've converted our application from V2 to V4, and now the word "Concept" has disappeared. I've read that their should appear a pencil at the left of the record, but I don't see this. 

Is there something special we have to do to obtain this pencil, or any indication to show this is a DRAFT record?

Thanks a lot,

Helga

entry.title: Pre-configured sorting order for Child entity in RAP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am creating a simple RAP application. I am facing issue while pre-configuring the sorting order for the child entity entries. 

I analyzed some of the demo applications provided by SAP but could not find the relevant examples. Also tried to search for the old posts with same query but could not find.

Could you please guide me in this regard.

My application has 2 entities. CASE – Parent entity and FORMS – Child entity.

Metadata extension for the parent (Case) entity

 

 It is correctly pre-sorting the table entries as per the annotations.

 

Metadata extension for the child (Forms) entity

 

But it is not pre-sorting the table entries.

entry.title: Side effect not working after deleting the child instance
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am creating a simple RAP application. I am facing issue with the side effect not working as expected when I delete the child entity.

I analyzed some of the demo applications provided by SAP but could not find the relevant examples.

Could you please guide me in this regard.

My application has 2 entities. FORM – Parent entity and PAYMENT – Child entity.

FORM has 2 amounts – Expected amount and Difference amount.

The difference amount must be adjusted as soon as new Payment is created or deleted.

Base behavior definition - Payment

side effects { $self affects field _forms.Diffamount; }

Behavior projection

projection;

strict ( 2 );

use draft;

use side effects;

Initially, Expected amount and Difference amount are same because there is no Payment.

Adding a payment

New difference amount is calculated and updated in the draft table through determination.

New difference amount is updated on the Form object page due to side effect.

Saved the changes to the persistent table.

 

Deleting the payment

New difference amount is calculated and updated in the draft table through determination.

But new difference amount is NOT updated on the Form object page.

After manual reload the difference amount is updated

entry.title: download flight data in eclipse from github
entry.content:
abap-platform-refscen-flight/README.md at ABAP-platform-cloud · SAP-samples/abap-platform-refscen-flight · GitHub referencing this document but facing errors while activating the packages.

Can someone please help with this?

entry.title: How to make Quick View in sap rap eclipse?
entry.content: "Is it possible to display a QuickView with the user's email and phone number when hovering over or clicking on the 'Created By' field on the Object Page?

entry.title: Seeking Guidance: UI State Persistence in RAP Unmanaged Query after Intent-Based Navigation
entry.content:
I’m currently working on a custom application using an Unmanaged RAP Query where we’ve implemented Intent-Based Navigation (IBN) to various standard SAP apps.

While the forward navigation works as expected, we are encountering an issue with the "Return" flow. When navigating back from the standard app to our custom RAP app, the UI state is lost—the filters are cleared, and the previously queried data is gone. It behaves as a fresh launch rather than a return to the previous state.

Standard SAP apps typically maintain this context (Pagination/Filter selections) via Inner App State or Selection Variant persistence.

Could anyone provide insight on how to properly implement state handling in an Unmanaged RAP context? Specifically:

  1. Are there specific annotations or manifest settings required to enable Component/UI State persistence?

  2. Does the Unmanaged Query require a specific implementation to "re-read" the navigation context upon return?

Looking forward to your expert advice!

Best regards,

Rowie

entry.title: SAP RAP - fields of root and child on one object page
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I have a simple managed RAP-Scenarion with a BO containing the follwing Entities:

  • Root entity (e.g. Invoice)
  • One Child Entity  (e.g. Position)
  • Cardianality is [1..*]

When I start the Application, I can click on create and enter the Data for the Root-Node. After that, I can click on create again and entert he data fort he child. So far, so good. This is the standard behavior the RAP Framework offers.

 

I’m wondering if it is possible, to create a managed scenarion with an Object Page, where all Fields of the Root and the Child are displayed all at once.

I found a solution here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/create-by-association-for-1-1-composition-in-rap-unmanaged/qaq-p/14006338. But after implementing, the fields of the child are shown in a second facet on the same screen as the root entity. But the fields are not editable. I think this is because of the cardinality I used in my example. The cardinality in the mentioned link between root and child is 0..1.

 

Thank you for any hints, tricks …

 

BR

 

Peter

entry.title: ABAP RAP - Action is not Updating the UI (unmanaged / managed)
entry.content:
Hello Community

I am currently trying to fill a field with a different value using an action. To do this, I create a READ entity to determine the selected rows, then I change the field and return it using the Result statement.

Unfortunately, the UI is not updated so that the new value appears in the column.

I have stored my action as follows:
action load result [1] $self;

My action method looks like this:

READ ENTITIES OF XXXX IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY YYYYY
FROM CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(lt_rows)
FAILED failed.

LOOP AT lt_rows ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<row>).
<row>-FIELD1 = ‘NEW_TEXT’.
<row>-FIELD2 = ‘NEW TEXT 2’.
INSERT VALUE #( %tky = <row>-%tky %param = <row> ) INTO TABLE result.
ENDLOOP.

Regardless of whether I try it in a managed or unmanaged environment, it does not work. Could someone assist me in identifying what the problem might be?

Update: I did some debugging today and found out that the odata call is always triggered and overwrite my changed result!
But how can i prevent this?

Current system is SAP S4HANA 2023 FP03.

Best regards, Wolfgang

entry.title: How can i restrict access to custom CDS View Data by Access Control on aspect pfcg_auth in S4HPC
entry.content:
Hi.

I need to restrict access to CDS View Data by Access Control on PFCG in S4HPC.

How can i link Authorization Object with Business Role?

I've created custom CDS View

Also Access Control on PFCG authorization

I also created custom Authorization Object / Field ZVHAOBJ1 / ZVHFLD1. 

Now question: how can i assign Authorization Object ZVHAOBJ1 to particular Business Role to restrict access to CDS View Data for:

  • Users that has proper authorization can view data according to restriction described above (like, only particular suppliers and only if has Read authorization)
  • Other users cannot read the data

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: Make field read-only in table but editable in Object Page
entry.content:
I have a custom app where in the Object Page, there is section for a table where i can add new business partner.

But I want the fields to be read-only when it is viewed as a table in the Object Page.

I want it to be editable when I access the row into another the BP Object Page.

I already tried using dynamic feature control, but the logic cannot tell whether the app is in table view or in object page view. Need your help on this matter. Thanks!

entry.title: While creating QN attachment in API I am getting the authorization error
entry.content:
I have successfully posted the Quality Notification via API IN PUBLIC CLOUD. After creation while trying to create an attachment in Quality Notification using API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet, I am getting authorization error. I have used the system credentials SAP_COM_0153 (which is used for QN).

Kindly help me in resolving this issue

entry.title: RAP‑Based Service Does Not Support Aggregation Totals with Filters and Group‑By
entry.content:
We are implementing a Fiori Elements List Report using a RAP‑based OData service (OData V2 or V4).
The business requirement is to show aggregated totals (SUM) for multiple numeric columns. These totals must update dynamically whenever:

  • Filters are applied
  • Group By is enabled
  • Group levels expand/collapse
  • Sorting or table personalization is applied

    Most Important Requirement:

    When the List Report table is grouped, the system must display an aggregation subtotal row for each group (group-level total), not only a grand total.

    However, RAP currently does not allow analytical annotations or analytical CDS entities to be used with transactional behavior. Because of this limitation:

    • We cannot enable annotations such as
      • @analytical.query: true
      • @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
      • @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      • RAP services cannot perform backend aggregations or expose group-level totals.
      • As a result, neither grand totals nor group-level totals can appear in the List Report.

entry.title: RAP + Fiori elements: How do I show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page
entry.content:
Hello Everybody,

Actually I have created a RAP OData v4 in SAP S/HANA on-premise with a Fiori elements application. I am trying to display the data in my object page in hierarchical way. I have tried with define hierarchy view and the annotation @odata.hierarchy.recursiveHierarchy, but my system version does not support it. 
Does anyone have a solution to show hierarchical data inside a Fiori Elements Object Page?

Thank you,
